content.en:
Deacon Lin ran away, and Ye Tian stopped the other party.

"Ninefold to the Dao Realm, looking for death!"

Legend has it that the Dao Void Demon smiled coldly.

No matter how powerful the Ninefold Dao Realm is, the demons are incomparable, and without the body of legends, they can't exert much strength here.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian fought with the Legend Dao Void Demon.

As soon as he fought, Ye Tian knew that his strength was inferior to that of the other party, even if his physical fitness far surpassed that of the other Nine Folds Dao Realm, but compared to the Legendary Body, it was still inferior.

Of course, the other party's legendary body was suppressed by the sea of fog, and Ye Tian was only slightly weaker.

"This guy should be a top-notch legendary body, similar to the legendary body of the Immortal Emperor, but he is already injured, and I can really kill him!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

When he said to kill, he naturally did not rely on his own copy body, but multiple copy bodies.

Thundered!!!!!

The battle continued, and Ye Tian was also fighting for his life.

After some time, several of Ye Tian's other replica bodies rushed here and began to besiege this legendary Dao Void Demon.

"What, and a clone!"

This legendary Dao Void Demon finally recognized Ye Tian.

"You are Ye Tian of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance!"

It's useless to recognize it, and the fight has to be carried out.

Gradually, this legendary Dao Void Demon began to fight for his life and tried to escape, but Ye Tian was not afraid of losing his copy body at all.

Ultimately.

At the cost of a replica body on the verge of death, Ye Tian slashed this legendary Dao Void Demon.

"This guy doesn't have a lot of resources to come in, but there's a good thing!"

Ye Tian took out a piece of a strange flower.

If he is not mistaken, this should be the Eternal Darkness Flower, which is very valuable, and even some Supreme Legendary Bodies need this treasure.

Moreover, the Eternal Darkness Flower can also be used to improve his cultivation, for example, if he devours the Eternal Darkness Flower now, his cultivation can also be greatly improved.

"It's a pity that I don't have time to refine, put it away!"

Ye Tian quickly left here.

In the following days, Ye Tian's other replica bodies had been looking for resources, and occasionally if they were unlucky, they encountered a terrifying legendary Dao realm, and they were directly killed, and they couldn't escape.

Fortunately, the sea of fog is relatively large, and the perception is not far away, so the probability of encountering the Supreme Void Demon is not high.

If you encounter a battle, you can stay away from it, and there is not much danger in fact.

His replica body fell, mainly because he took the initiative to come over, and then he was killed.

this day.

Ye Tian also found something good.

"Dragon Ancient Heavenly Gold Stone!"

And not a piece, but a bunch.

"Luck!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

He remembered that in the Supreme Void, there were elders who purchased the Longgu Heavenly Gold Stone, a piece of 100 million Eternal Gold Coins, which was worth as much as the Qiong Jelly Dao Gold Liquid.

And there are at least hundreds of Dragon Ancient Heavenly Gold Stones here, and their value is so high.

"If I break through to the Legendary Dao Realm in the future, I will also need various materials, maybe I will need the Dragon Gu Heavenly Gold Stone. "

Ye Tian put away these Dragon Gu Heavenly Gold Stones, and then left.

......

Time flies.

In the sea of fog, a Famous Dao Realm and the Supreme Dao Void Demon fought, and both sides fell.

Mo River Fortress.

Elder Mo Xian was paying attention to the Wandao Mirror.

"Another deacon has fallen, and in a short period of time, more than fifty deacons have fallen!" Elder Mo Xian muttered.

He didn't care about this loss, he cared about which side the opportunity to break through the patriarch fell on this time.

Time passes slowly.

The losses on both sides are intensifying, but there are also Supreme Dao Realm or Supreme Dao Void Demons who have come out of the sea of fog after finding good things.

However, Ye Tian killed a lot of Supreme Dao Void Demons, and he successively killed six Legendary Dao Void Demons, and more than 20 Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons.

"After killing so many, there should be hope to get an elder quota, after all, the deacons are not strong, and the elders occupy the quota again!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

And he killed these Supreme Dao Void Demons, collected their belongings, and obtained a lot of good things, all of which were top-level resources that were not available in the past, suitable for the level of the Legend Dao Realm.

"I don't know if the treasure resources that have broken through the veteran level have been found?"

Ye Tian felt that he didn't have the strength to snatch it.

Soho and other legends to the Dao realm are here, it is a close to the patriarchal level of existence, how terrifying the strength is, killing the top legends to the Dao realm, it is like killing ants.

Even if he reaches the sea of fog and can't cast the rules of the Dao Realm, his physical strength is still terrifying, enough to kill the ordinary Legend Dao Realm in seconds, and he can also be killed in seconds.

On the side of the Dao Void Demon, there must also be this kind of legend to the Dao Void Demon, what qualifications does he have to snatch?

He just honestly got some more resources, and then got an elder spot, and didn't think much else.

......

Sea of fog.

An area was a black mist, and in this black mist, there was a black lotus flower, releasing a terrifying aura.

And near the black lotus, there was a black giant snake, swimming in the black mist.

A legendary Dao realm came here and was attracted by the black lotus.

"This is the legendary primordial black lotus, with it, the hope of becoming a patriarch has greatly increased!"

He took a deep breath and prepared to try to pick this primordial black lotus.

But just as he stepped into the range of the black mist, the black serpent attacked.

Rumble!!!!

As soon as the two sides collided, this legendary Dao realm was immediately blown away, and his whole body was cracked.

"Forget that I'm in the Sea of Mist, here, my strength can't be exerted at all, and this black giant snake is the companion spirit of the primordial black lotus, it can urge the power of the primordial black lotus, and it can exert the strength of ordinary legends to the Dao realm, I am far from being an opponent!"

This legendary Dao Realm was unwilling to leave, so he informed one of the top Legends of his own clan about the information here.

If his own clan obtained the primordial black lotus, it would also be a great credit.

However.

In an accident, another legendary Dao Void Demon came here and also discovered the primordial black lotus.

That's it.

More and more Legends to the Dao Realm and Legends to the Dao Void Demons are fighting, and both sides are trying to snatch the primordial black lotus.

this day.

Soho is here.

Soho, Mo Ya, and Long Teng, three legendary Dao realms that are incomparably close to the strength of the patriarch have all descended here.

And on the side of the Dao Void Demon, there are also several invincible demon lords who have descended.

This place quickly became their battlefield, and ordinary legends did not dare to approach it even to the Dao Realm.

Thundered!!!!

The two sides kept fighting, both in order to snatch the primordial black lotus.

Suddenly.

Soho erupted with a terrifying legendary body, rushed out of the blockade in one fell swoop, killed the black giant snake in one blow, took the primordial black lotus and fled.

"What, Soho actually cultivated the Ice Phoenix Legend Body to the consummation realm!!!!"

They were shocked.
